question.label: Next commitment
question.name: What is the one move you want to make before we next meet?
question.description: Closes on a concrete commitment that can anchor the next conversation.

answer: I want to start with one leadership bet where I drive the decision, not just the design output.

assessment.note: He names a specific next move — owning one leadership bet end-to-end — which shows clearer direction and forward growth intent.

history.answer_excerpt: I also need clearer sponsorship in rooms where priorities are set.
If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.
Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.
I think I need to own a cross-org decision area, not just deliver strong design outcomes.

I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.
